summary: Unified requirements for OpenTelemetry instrumentation integration

requirements.title: OpenTelemetry Instrumentation Implementation
requirements.statement: The system SHALL add OpenTelemetry instrumentation for requests and distributed tracing.

acceptance.given: The application receives an HTTP request
acceptance.when: The request is processed through the application stack
acceptance.outcome: A distributed trace is generated with appropriate spans

acceptance.given: The application is configured with OTLP exporter
acceptance.outcome: Traces are exported via OTLP protocol to the configured endpoint

rules.rule: All telemetry data must comply with OpenTelemetry standards for trace format and instrumentation
rules.rationale: Ensures compatibility with observability tooling and maintains consistent telemetry data structure

rules.rule: Instrumentation must not introduce significant performance overhead
rules.rationale: Maintains application performance while enabling observability
